inputs: source boson mode JSON with modeVector or eigenvectorCoefficients
blockingRules: boson vector length must equal edgeCount * dimG
fermion eigenvector lengths must equal cellCount * spinorDim * dimG * 2
edge length and edge direction arrays must match cells-per-edge count
all vector and geometry values must be finite

physicalPredictionStatus.reason: the source-backed replay package runner exists and is tested, but has not yet been executed over the actual Phase12 W/Z candidate set with production geometry and selected fermion modes

nextPhaseRecommendation: Create the production Phase12 replay job that selects persisted W/Z-like boson candidates and source-backed fermion modes, runs the Phase83 runner, and emits comparison-ready prediction artifacts.
